description.content: Retrieve Donald Trump quotes individually, randomly, or via full text search.
Returns a single random Donald Trump quote with HAL `_links` and `_embedded` author/source records.

response.name: A random quote was returned successfully.

item.name: Tronald Dump Get Quote by ID

request.name: Tronald Dump Get Quote by ID

description.content: Returns a specific Donald Trump quote by its unique identifier, with HAL `_links` and `_embedded` author/source records.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the quote.

response.name: The quote was found and returned.

description.content: Full text search across the corpus of Donald Trump quotes. Returns a HAL response with `_embedded.quotes`, total/count metadata, and pagination links.

query.description: (Required) Free text query string to search quote values against.
Number of results returned per page.

response.name: Search returned successfully (may contain zero matches).

description.content: Browse the controlled vocabulary of tags attached to quotes.
Returns the controlled vocabulary of all tags that exist across the quote corpus.

request.name: Tronald Dump Get Quotes by Tag

query.description: Number of results returned per page.

variable.description: (Required) The exact tag value to filter quotes by.

response.name: Tag matched and quotes returned successfully.

description.content:
Tronald Dump is an open community REST API exposing a historical archive of Donald Trump quotes with sources, authors, tags, and a search interface. Responses follow HAL (Hypertext Application Language) JSON conventions with `_links` and `_embedded` sections for hypermedia navigation. The API supports random quote retrieval, quote lookup by ID, full text search with pagination, tag browsing, author lookup, and source lookup. No authentication is required. The original public service ran at api.tronalddump.io and has gone offline since 2023; this spec is preserved for community SDKs, archival mirrors, and historical reconstruction.

Contact Support:
 Name: Marcel Wijnker (Original Author)
